title: ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE - 211info
text: LINES FOR LIFE ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline that offers information for individuals and their family members seeking crisis intervention, treatment referral, and general chemical dependency information. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 923-4357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (800) 923-4357 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Substance Use Disorder Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CONSTRUCTION CARELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MILITARY HELPLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIOR LONELINESS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTHLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINES FOR LIFE
